title: Ytgld : Better  Beacon
description: This mod modifies the light logic of the beacon
body:
## [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ytgld-better-beacon)
## summary
This mod modifies the light logic of the beacon, making the light of the beacon very bright and beautiful.
Light supports dyeing of different types of glass.

![Beacon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4710c618a6827e029afd140fdc46e784046da3c3_0.webp)

## questions and answers

A: Why didn't I see the effect of the image

B: Please turn off rendering mods or other lighting and shadows

A: Can I use your mod into the document integration package?

B: Yes, you can
